metadata.description: Decision matrix for selecting the optimal model and platform for each cinematic style. Used by video generation agents to make cost/quality/speed tradeoffs.
metadata.decision_framework: Decision rules are prioritized: 1) Quality threshold, 2) Budget constraint, 3) Speed requirement
metadata.target_audience: AI video generation agents, production schedulers, cost optimization workflows

logic.reasoning: All non-video styles use static images as foundation

sub_decisions.when_to_use: Title cards, key sequences, high-visibility content

logic.reasoning: Wildlife cinematography can use either images or short video sequences

sub_decisions.recommendation: nano_banana_2 on kie.ai with 'wildlife cinematography' prompt
sub_decisions.when_to_use: Creature showcase, close-ups, specimen beauty shots
Creature behavior, movement showcase, cinematic reveals

logic.reasoning: Underwater footage is the primary video workhorse; needs depth color simulation and water particles

sub_decisions.when_to_use: Key sequences, creature reveals, cinematic moments

logic.reasoning: Kie.ai is 30-40% cheaper on all image models (Nano Banana 2/Pro)
Kie.ai offers Veo 3, Kling 2.1 at significantly lower cost than fal.ai
logic.exception: Use fal.ai only for Wan 2.5 if ultra-budget is required

logic.fallback: Use seedance_1_5_pro on kie.ai ($0.052/second) or veo_3_quality ($0.25/second)

style_mappings.prompt_modifier: '3D render style, clean geometry, synthetic colors'

style_mappings.post_processing: Remotion overlays: depth markers, labels, scale indicators

style_mappings.prompt_modifier: 'Underwater cinematic footage, depth color gradient, water particles, bioluminescence where applicable'
style_mappings.post_processing: SFX layer (Suno), color grading for zone transition

style_mappings.prompt_modifier: 'Wildlife cinematography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, professional documentary'
style_mappings.post_processing: Bokeh/blur added in Remotion if needed

style_mappings.prompt_modifier: 'Scientific diagram, clean graphic design, information-dense, high contrast'
style_mappings.post_processing: Text labels added ONLY in Remotion (never in image model)

cost_optimization_strategies.approach: Use nano_banana_2 on kie.ai at 1K resolution for all non-hero sequences
Use kling_2_1_standard for rough cuts, kling_2_1_pro for final renders
cost_optimization_strategies.estimated_savings: 50% compared to Veo 3 Quality, still maintains broadcast quality

cost_optimization_strategies.strategy: Reserve hero budgets for key moments
cost_optimization_strategies.approach: Use Veo 3 Quality or Nano Banana Pro only for: title cards, creature reveals, final shots
cost_optimization_strategies.rationale: Viewer attention peaks at specific narrative beats; allocate higher quality where it matters most

cost_optimization_strategies.approach: Generate 10+ images in single prompt batch → reduces overhead

quality_tiers.use_case: Title sequences, creature reveals, key narrative moments

decision_tree_example.scenario: Producing a 30-second underwater descent sequence for style_04 (HD Underwater Camera) with moderate budget
decision_tree_example.step_5_set_prompt: 'Underwater cinematic descent, water particles, bioluminescence, natural depth color gradient'
decision_tree_example.step_7_post_process: Add SFX layer from Suno, color grade in Remotion for zone transitions

rules_for_agents.rule: ALWAYS use kie.ai as default platform
rules_for_agents.exception: Only use fal.ai if model not available on kie.ai

rules_for_agents.reason: Suspended March 15, 2026; use Seedance 1.5 Pro or Veo 3 instead

rules_for_agents.meaning: Generate base images → extend to video if needed; never video-first
rules_for_agents.rationale: Images are cheapest, fastest, most flexible for iteration

rules_for_agents.rule: Text labels ALWAYS in Remotion, NEVER in image model
rules_for_agents.rationale: Models hallucinate text; Remotion allows precise placement and animation

rules_for_agents.rule: Schedule visuals against narration beat_sheet.json timestamps
rules_for_agents.rationale: Narrator is master clock; prevents timing gaps and ensures pacing alignment

future_updates.action: Re-add to comparison table once pricing announced
Monitor kie.ai and fal.ai release calendars quarterly
